calendar.matters:
Status Conference For Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Justin C. White, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Penh Liu parent and Guardian ad Litem. Minor Jaimie Liu present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
Norman L. Hallquist, Esq., appearing for Defendant.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,500.00 payable to MATIASIC ROTH & JOHNSON LLP
Reimbursment for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $ 801.42
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the amount of $291.36 Medi-Cal-Department of Health Cervices.
Total allowance of fees and expenses from the settlement judgment: $2,592.78

A net balance of $12,407.22 to be deposited into a blocked account at Citibank 590 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94104, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on Arpril 16, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
